name: French Pot Roast
recipeIngredient: 4 pounds Boneless round or chuck roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim excess fat from the roast; rub beef well with flour; brown in oil in a large skillet or an electric slow cooker.
2. Place meat in slow cooker; pour onion soup over; cover cooker.
3. Cook on low for 10 hours or on high for 5 hours, or until meat is tender when pierced with a two-tined fork. Place green pepper rings on roast to steam during the last 10 minutes of cooking. Remove meat and pepper rings to heated serving platter; keep hot while making gravy from juices.
4. Turn heat to high. Combine 1/4 cup flour and 1/2 cup cold water in a bowl to make a smooth pâte. Stir into slow cooker; cover; cook for 15 minutes; taste and season with salt and pepper if needed.
